## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, reporting, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Record SEO Leads:** January generated 15 SEO-attributed SQLs, a new monthly record and the first since last March.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**New Pillar Strategy Approved:** A new content pillar framework, approved by Allison, will align content with Monograph's product features and website strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [**AI Tool Demoed:** Katya demoed Checklat, growthx.ai's new AI visibility tool. It offers faster data population (30 min vs. months for competitors) and will provide client access in February.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Pipeline Launch Messaging:** Allison shared the new Pipeline product launch framework, which replaces the "Leads" feature messaging and will guide growthx.ai's content.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Reporting

  - [**January Win:** 15 SEO-attributed SQLs, a new monthly record.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Attribution Logic:** GTM tracks SQLs where a blog post is the first touchpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Reporting Access:** Katya needs a Metabase export (URL, date, leads) for detailed analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Action:** Allison will request a public link from Ops, as direct access is not permitted.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Pillar Transition:** The January report will use the old pillars to ensure accurate MoM comparison. The new framework will be used starting in February.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)

### Content Strategy & Pillars

  - [**New Pillar Framework:** Approved by Allison.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns content with Monograph's product features and website strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [**Website Impact:** Feature pages linked from the main nav will be created to mirror the new pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Content Tagging:** Airtable will tag content by keyword intent, primary firm, and primary role to ensure balanced distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** Katya proposed creating thought leadership content by repurposing recordings from Robert.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Action:** Allison will ask the team if this content is needed for the Pipeline launch.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### AI Strategy & Tooling

  - [**AI Performance Context:** A recent drop in Scrunch metrics was likely caused by a reporting change on their end, not a true performance decline.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [**Checklat Demo:** Katya demoed growthx.ai's new AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Key Differentiator:** Its prompt library (100k+ prompts) provides immediate data (30-min population), avoiding the multi-month ramp-up time of competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Access:** Monograph will receive free access in February.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**AI Optimization Tactics:** Katya proposed adding FAQs and TLDRs to articles to improve AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Action:** Allison will add an FAQ section to the new blog template (H2 for "FAQ," H3s for questions).](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Pipeline Product Launch

  - [**New Framework Shared:** Allison provided the framework for the Pipeline product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [**SEO Focus:** The page will target "proposals," "forecasting," and "opportunity tracking."](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Messaging Focus:** The page will prioritize opportunity tracking and forecasting over "proposals," despite its higher search volume, to avoid misrepresenting the product's full scope.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Geo-Based SEO

  - [**Strategy:** A selective, topic-by-topic approach, not a programmatic one.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Avoids creating low-quality, redundant content for topics without significant regional variation.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [**Opportunities:** Topics with clear state-by-state differences, such as salary data, continuing education requirements, and legal considerations.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)

      - [Add an FAQ section to the new blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [Incorporate the new content pillars into upcoming assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [Update the Airtable content tracker with the new pillar framework.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [Add actionable AI optimization tactics to the January performance report.](https://fathom.video/share/22MyFUuXVgzsrbCXyg_52_TaRhywophx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
